vuln-0001.name: SQL Injection in Login Form - Authentication Bypass
vuln-0001.description: The email parameter in the login form is vulnerable to SQL injection, allowing attackers to bypass authentication and gain admin access without valid credentials. The vulnerability exposes the admin user's password hash and allows full account takeover.
vuln-0001.remediation: Investigate and remediate: SQL Injection in Login Form - Authentication Bypass

vuln-0002.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) - Full User Data Exposure
vuln-0002.description: The User API endpoint allows unauthorized access to any user's data by simply changing the numeric ID in the URL. This exposes PII including emails, roles, deluxe tokens, and profile images for all users without authentication or authorization checks.
vuln-0002.remediation: Investigate and remediate: Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) - Full User Data Exposure

vuln-0003.name: JWT Authentication Bypass via Algorithm Confusion (none)
vuln-0003.description: The application accepts JWT tokens with "alg" set to "none" and grants full authenticated access without verifying the token signature. This allows unauthenticated attackers to access any protected API endpoint by crafting a JWT with alg=none and specifying any user ID/role in the payload.
vuln-0003.remediation: Investigate and remediate: JWT Authentication Bypass via Algorithm Confusion (none)

vuln-0004.name: Business Logic Flaw - Arbitrary Price Manipulation in Shopping Cart
vuln-0004.description: The shopping cart API allows clients to set arbitrary prices for items. When adding products to the cart, the 'price' parameter is not validated against the product's actual price, allowing attackers to manipulate the price to any value (e.g., 0.01) and purchase items at significantly reduced prices.
vuln-0004.remediation: Investigate and remediate: Business Logic Flaw - Arbitrary Price Manipulation in Shopping Cart

vuln-0005.name: Information Disclosure - Exposed Application Metrics Endpoint
vuln-0005.description: The /metrics endpoint is publicly accessible and exposes detailed application metrics including startup duration, file upload counts, task execution times, and internal application behavior. This information could aid attackers in understanding the application's internals and planning further attacks.
vuln-0005.remediation: Investigate and remediate: Information Disclosure - Exposed Application Metrics Endpoint

vuln-0006.name: Missing CSRF Protection - User Creation Without Anti-CSRF Token
vuln-0006.description: The application does not enforce CSRF protection on the user creation endpoint. An attacker can create new user accounts without requiring a CSRF token, allowing attackers to register malicious users on the application via cross-site requests.
vuln-0006.remediation: Investigate and remediate: Missing CSRF Protection - User Creation Without Anti-CSRF Token
